title: 日本ダービーの後に・魅力を伝える舞台

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky has a great time running the
Japanese Derby, a race that Umamusume only run
once in their lives.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, I suggest that she challenge the Arima
Kinen next, the best place to show her running to
the world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The suggestion surprises her, but she agrees and
sets her sights on the Arima Kinen.
